description_long: This object depicts a suburban residential neighborhood, featuring multiple detached houses arranged along a network of paved roads. The houses are surrounded by green lawns, landscaped gardens, and a central circular park area with trees and pathways. The entire neighborhood is bordered by a dense line of trees, creating a clear boundary and sense of enclosure. The houses exhibit modern architectural styles with flat and low-pitched roofs, large windows, and a mix of single and two-story structures. Driveways, garages, and sidewalks are visible, providing access and connectivity throughout the area. The layout is organized and symmetrical, with communal green spaces and a focus on accessibility.
description: A modern suburban neighborhood with multiple detached houses, green lawns, and a central park, all enclosed by a border of trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main entrance road, central park, and a symmetrical arrangement of houses with the tree-lined boundary most prominent at the front.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear of the neighborhood, showing more of the backyards, garages, and the continuation of the tree border.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a wide perspective of the neighborhood, emphasizing the central park, side streets, and the distribution of houses along the perimeter.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the opposite side of the main entrance, showing the back of the central park and the houses facing away from the main road.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, some with small porches or overhangs, and direct access to driveways or sidewalks.
